name: RedDoorz Syariah near Pasar Aceh Shopping Centre

reviews.reviewComments: Booked this room for 2 night. The location, the room and service are all good and worth the money.

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Placé au fond d une impasse 
Loin du centre 
Un vieil hotel, pas de drap du dessus mais une couette sans housse, sale. Pire hotel de notre voyage.... 
Vraiment glauque..

reviews.reviewComments:
I and my husband had a room just to sleep overnight.  We ordered food delivery to the room and didn't go out.  For sleeping purpose room was very good. Bed was comfortable but toilet unpleasant and we didn't take a shower there.
Hotel is in the residential area so no shops or restaurants near.
A man in a reception was very friendly but didn't talk english so I was using Google translater.
If you are looking for cheap accommodation to sleep then this hotel is fine.

reviews.reviewPositives: De kamers waren prima, douche iet munder maar heel aardig en behulpzaam personeel
reviews.reviewNegatives: De wijk en hoe afgelegen het ligt

reviews.reviewComments:
The room I stayed some bug bite me and next morning there is blood on the bedsheet. I think there might be bedbugs or some other blood sucking insects infested in the bed.
Toilet  is not clean and rusty shower head.
One day the attendant switched off main electricity switch board in my room without telling me. When I arrived at night only my room didn’t have electricity and it was very dark. 
The attendant was not at the premise so I sent few messages to the attendant through What’s App to let him know that that is no electricity on my room. My What’s App Messages were being read but no response.
I only got a reply nearly after 3 hours if waiting. This was not professional from the attendant at all and I was very disappointed about this. 
The Management or owner should train their staff about professionalism and a good customer service.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Lokasi yang jauh ke dalam. Tidak berapa selesa kerana bilik air tidak mempunyai pintu dan semasa membuka paip untuk mandi, air turun dari atas ceiling

reviews.originalComment: Dapur terlalu banyak piring kotor, kamar mandi terlalu banyak kerak disetiap sudut, nggak ada lemari untuk menyimpan pakaian, tong sampah juga harus turun kebawah,.
reviews.reviewComments: The kitchen has too many dirty dishes, the bathroom has too much grime in every corner, there is no cupboard to store clothes, and the trash cans also need to be taken down.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Dirty and disgusting. Not recommended !! Try find another place

reviews.originalComment: Katanya bisa refund, padahal bukan ngak mau, saya sudah datang di hari H dan tiba² harus bergerak sehingga tidak jadi menginap, tapi ternyata tidak bisa di refund seperti yg dikatakan di aplikasi, ngak jelas
reviews.reviewComments: They said I could get a refund, but I really don't want to. I arrived on the day and suddenly had to leave, so I didn't get to stay, but it turns out I can't get a refund as stated in the app, it's unclear.

reviews.reviewTitle: I would NEVER sleep there again - and I do travel a lot on a low budget. But this was way beyond what I/we can handl
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Dirtiest Room we had on our entire trip. I think the earlier recommendations are fake. This got more like  3 out of 10 points than more than 9. 
Literally everything was dirty, the toilet was broken, the bathroom was so dirty that you couldn’t even take a shower, even the tiles on the wall were really dirty and there were ants in the bathroom. Towels and bedsheets were dirty as well. You couldn’t touch anything without feeling disgusted.

reviews.reviewComments: Booked this room for 2 night. The location, the room and service are all good and worth the money.

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Dirtiest Room we had on our entire trip. I think the earlier recommendations are fake. This got more like  3 out of 10 points than more than 9. 
Literally everything was dirty, the toilet was broken, the bathroom was so dirty that you couldn’t even take a shower, even the tiles on the wall were really dirty and there were ants in the bathroom. Towels and bedsheets were dirty as well. You couldn’t touch anything without feeling disgusted.

reviews.originalComment: Ac rusak. Kamar kotor, bekas rokok ga dibuang.. banyak sampah di selah kasur dan dinding.. selimut kotor kyk ga pernah diganti.. kasur rusak.. kamar mandi kotor.. aroma kamar ga enak, bau kamar mandi.. murah siy, tapi kondisi sangat buruk.. masih banyak penginapan lain yg LBH murah tapi lbh baik kondisi daripada penginapan ini
reviews.reviewComments: So damaged. The room is dirty, cigarette butts not disposed of... a lot of trash in the gaps between the mattress and the wall... the blanket is dirty like it has never been changed... the mattress is damaged... the bathroom is dirty... the room smells bad, the bathroom smell... it's cheap though, but the condition is very poor... there are still many other accommodations that are cheaper but in better condition than this one.

reviews.originalComment: Seprei kotor banyak noda dan ada rambut, handuk sudah buluk, meja kotor dan banyak rambut, kamar mandi sangat sangat kotor, wastafel sangat sangat kotor juga, lantai berdebu dan AC tidak nyala, tidak cocok menginap disini dengan membawa anak kecil, niatnya mau numpang mandi krn dirumah listrik padam dan tidak ada air, ternyata sampai di penginapan ini sama saja tidak bisa mandi dan tidak bisa hidup AC. Tidak di sarankan membawa anak kecil, krn kamar kotor.
reviews.reviewComments: The bed sheets are dirty and have stains and hair, the towels are worn out, the table is dirty and has a lot of hair, the bathroom is very, very dirty, the sink is also very, very dirty, the floor is dusty and the air conditioning is not functioning, it's not suitable to stay here with small children. I intended to just use the shower here because the electricity at home was out and there was no water, but when I arrived at this accommodation, it turned out that I couldn't take a shower and the air conditioning didn't work either. It is not recommended to bring small children here because the rooms are dirty.

reviews.originalComment: Tidak saya rekomendasikan waktu sy mssuk kamar 2 ac nya mati  kamar mandinya kotor pokoknya jorok lah saya minta di tukar kamar pelayan nya  lama sekali merespon  kayak mau ,setelah saya ber debat bsru mau di kasih kamar 1 . Itupun ac  dingin  g bisa di matiin di kasih remot g bida s0
reviews.reviewComments: I do not recommend, when I entered the room, both air conditioners were not working, the bathroom was dirty, it was really filthy. I asked to change rooms, but the staff was very slow to respond, as if they didn't want to. After I argued, they finally agreed to give me room 1. Even then, the air conditioning was cold but could not be turned off; they gave me a remote that didn't work.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis tetapi penginapan Kotor, berantakan, bintang 3 lah untuk penginapan secara keseluruhan..
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location but the accommodation is dirty, a 3-star rating for the overall stay.
The room and the facilities inside is terrible. We couldn’t sleep at night at all. The smell of the room is awful. Will never comeback here anymore. Forgot about the bathroom, awful.

reviews.originalComment: Masalahnya di air yg susah kalau pagi
reviews.reviewComments: The problem is with the water that is difficult in the morning.

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman dan bersih. Tiap ke banda aceh selalu nginap disini best pokonya ✌🏻
reviews.reviewComments: Cozy and clean. Every time I go to Banda Aceh, I always stay here, it's the best! ✌🏻

reviews.originalComment:
Resepsionis ramah
Kamar mewah harga murah
Best👍🏼
reviews.reviewComments:
Friendly receptionist  
Luxury room at a low price  
Best👍🏼

reviews.originalComment: 自炊したかったのでキッチンがあるのは良かったです。でも水圧が弱くてトイレが流れにくかった。
reviews.reviewComments: I was glad that there was a kitchen because I wanted to cook for myself. However, the water pressure was weak, making it difficult to flush the toilet.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih dan bagus
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and nice.

reviews.originalComment: Reddoorz bintang 2 tapi serasa bintang 5. Mantap, pertahankan pelayanan baiknya.
reviews.reviewComments: Reddoorz is a 2-star hotel but feels like a 5-star. Great, keep up the good service.

reviews.originalComment: Kasurnya kurang nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: The mattress is not comfortable enough.

reviews.reviewTitle: The room is clean. The staff is ready whenever we need them.
reviews.originalTitle: Kamar nya bersih.kariawan nya siap kapan pun kta perlu.
reviews.originalComment: Yg jaga top deh pokoknya
reviews.reviewComments: Just make sure to keep the top safe, okay?

reviews.originalComment: Jangan kemari kalau mau coba silahkan aja yg rugi kalian juga sangat jera
reviews.reviewComments: Don't come here if you want to try, go ahead, you will be the one to lose, you are also very fed up.

reviews.originalComment: Kalau kepepet boleh lah..
reviews.reviewComments: If you're in a pinch, it's okay...

reviews.originalComment: Sy booking via agoda, setelah sy sampai dilokasi ternyata staf reseptionis tidak ada, sampai nunggu lebih dari 30 menit juga tdak ada, kondisi sangat jorok, lokasi sempit, pokok nya sangat tidak di rekomemdasi untk nginap disini..
reviews.reviewComments: I booked via Agoda, but when I arrived at the location, there was no receptionist. I waited for more than 30 minutes, and nobody showed up. The place was very dirty, it was cramped, and I definitely do not recommend staying here.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar besar bisa 4 orang, tetapi  kamar mandi bau
reviews.reviewComments: The large room can accommodate 4 people, but the bathroom smells.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasinya tidak rekomendasi, karena sekelilingnya sunyi, susah untuk perlu beli apa2. Gak dekat dengan pasar aceh seperti yang diklaim, itu kamarnya didepannya lgsg jalan..
reviews.reviewComments: The location is not recommended because the surroundings are quiet, making it difficult to buy anything. It's not close to the Aceh market as claimed; the room is right in front of the road.

reviews.reviewTitle: Penginapan yang terbaik di kota aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Untuk yang menginap disini. Fasilitas dan harga yang diberikan sesuai. Dilengkapi dengan kamar yang berisi dapur lengkap ada kompor kulkas dan Magicom membuat yang menginap bisa memasak. Fasilitas yang diberikan staf juga baik dan juga cepat tanggap. Terimakasih
